easy.title: Build a Complete HTML Document from Scratch
easy.description: Create a complete, valid HTML5 document about your favorite hobby. Include the DOCTYPE, proper head section with meta tags and title, and a body with a heading and two paragraphs. Verify your structure against a valid HTML template.
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title></title>
</head>
<body>

</body>
</html>
easy.solution:
Why I Love Photography

Photography allows me to capture moments and express my creativity through composition and lighting.

Whether it's landscape, portrait, or street photography, every shot tells a unique story.

medium.title: Create a Semantic Page Layout with Multiple Sections
medium.description: Build a complete HTML page for a fictional restaurant's homepage. Include: a header with the restaurant name and navigation (Home, Menu, About, Contact), a hero section with a welcoming message, a menu preview section with three items, an about section with a brief description, a contact section with address and phone, and a footer with copyright. Use only semantic HTML5 elements — no <div> tags allowed.
medium.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>The Rustic Table</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Build a semantic restaurant page without using <div> -->
</body>
</html>
medium.solution:
The Rustic Table

Home Menu About Contact

Welcome to The Rustic Table

Experience authentic Italian cuisine made with love and the freshest ingredients.

Menu Highlights

Margherita Pizza

Classic tomato, mozzarella, and basil baked in a wood-fired oven.

Spaghetti Carbonara

Creamy egg-based sauce with pancetta and Parmesan cheese.

Tiramisu

Layered coffee-flavored Italian dessert with mascarpone cream.

About Us

The Rustic Table has been serving homemade Italian cuisine since 1995.

Contact Us

hard.title: Build a Multi-Section Landing Page with Full Metadata
hard.description: Build a complete landing page for a tech conference. The page must include: full SEO metadata (description, keywords, author, Open Graph tags, Twitter card meta tags, favicon link), a header with navigation and conference branding, a hero section with countdown placeholder, a speakers section using <article> for each speaker, a schedule section using a table with <thead>, <tbody>, and <tfoot>, a registration form with all appropriate input types (text, email, tel, number, select, checkbox, radio, textarea), and a footer with links and copyright. The head must contain at least 15 meta tags/title/link elements. Validate the final document.
hard.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <!-- Add comprehensive metadata -->
    <title>TechCon 2026</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Build the complete landing page -->
</body>
</html>
